name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working — e.g. wrong/missing data, a crash, or ricardo.ch changed their page structure
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""

```
```

**What happened**

**What you expected instead**

**Version** (`ricardo-scraper --version`, or the git commit if running from source)

**If this looks like a Cloudflare challenge, not a real bug:** try again after
a few minutes' cooldown first (see the README's Cloudflare section) —
repeated rapid attempts from the same IP can raise Cloudflare's risk score
temporarily. Re-run with `-v`/`--verbose` and/or `--show-browser` if it
persists.

**If this looks like ricardo.ch changed their page structure:** paste the
relevant HTML/JSON-LD you got back (e.g. from `-v`/`--verbose`, or by
inspecting the page directly). This is the fastest way to confirm whether
ricardo.ch changed something on their end vs. a bug in this project.

```html
```
